mapper.select: SELECT * FROM item WHERE productid = #{productId} ORDER BY itemid

SELECT i.* FROM item i INNER JOIN product p ON i.productid = p.productid WHERE LOWER(p.name) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) OR LOWER(i.attr1) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) OR LOWER(i.attr2) LIKE LOWER(CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY i.itemid
SELECT * FROM item WHERE status = 'P' ORDER BY itemid
SELECT * FROM item WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY itemid
mapper.update: UPDATE item SET listprice = #{listPrice}, unitcost = #{unitCost} WHERE itemid = #{itemId}
UPDATE item SET status = #{status} WHERE itemid = #{itemId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM item WHERE itemid = #{itemId}
